Given the user is on the Home screen
When the user enters 'Paris' in the destination search bar and taps the Search button
Then the app should display a list of available accommodations in Paris

Given the user is viewing the search results for 'New York'
When the user applies the 'Free cancellation' filter
Then only accommodations with free cancellation should be shown in the results

Given the user is on the Accommodation Details screen for a selected hotel
When the user taps the 'Book Now' button and completes the booking form
Then the app should confirm the booking and display a booking confirmation screen

Given the user is on the Home screen and is not logged in
When the user taps the 'Sign In' button and enters valid credentials
Then the user should be logged in and redirected to the Home screen with their account information displayed

Given the user is on the Bookings screen with at least one upcoming booking
When the user selects a booking and taps the 'Cancel Booking' button
Then the app should prompt for confirmation and, upon confirmation, cancel the booking and update the booking status
